mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, p.status AS p_status FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT f.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, p.status AS p_status FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE product_id = #{productId}
